title: Indha Nimisham Lyrics Hello
stanzas:
paalai vanathil
oru devathai megam.
paalai vaarthathoru
paal nimisham.

vazhvin kadaisi
endha nimisham varaikkum.
vaasanai veesum
poo nimisham.

ippadiye ippadiye
irundhuvida koodaathaa
en kannil un imaigal
porunthivida koodaathaa

anbae un pakkathil
anaikindra vetpathil
uyirulla kaalam varai
oodaada koodaathaa

nimmadhiye minnadhiye
nenjai vittu pogadhe
ennuyirai theekkuzhiyil
erindhu vittu pogaadhe

pallaviye pallaviye
paadal vittu pogaadhe
vaasal varai vandha nadhi
vattrivida koodaathe

manam konda nambikkai
maarivida koodaathe
en maarbodu un soodu
aarivida koodaathe

anbae un kan sindhum
aanandha kanneeril
ennodu ennuyirum
karaindhu vidal aagaathaa.

paalai vanathil
oru devathai megam.
paalai vaarthathoru
paal nimisham.

vazhvin kadaisi
endha nimisham varaikkum.
vaasanai veesum
poo nimisham.

seo.title: Indha Nimisham Lyrics Hello

seo.keywords: Hello, Deva, Hariharan, K.S.Chitra, Indha Nimisham full lyrics, Hello songs lyrics, Indha Nimisham lyrics snippets, Indha Nimisham WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Indha Nimisham lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Indha Nimisham?

The song captures a romantic and nostalgic theme, highlighting precious moments in life.

Who are the singers of this song?

Hariharan and K.S.Chitra lend their voices to this beautiful duet.

Who composed the music for Hello?

The music was composed by Deva, known for his melodious tunes.

When was the movie Hello released?

The movie was released in the year 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Hello, the song Indha Nimisham beautifully captures the essence of a cherished moment between lovers. Sung by the legendary Hariharan and K.S.Chitra, the melody evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance. Deva's composition enhances the emotional depth, making it a timeless classic. The lyrics speak of a divine moment, creating an atmosphere of love and tranquility, perfect for intimate occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the timeless charm of Indha Nimisham from the movie Hello, where Hariharan and K.S.Chitra's soulful voices blend seamlessly with Deva's melodious composition. This romantic duet captures the essence of love and nostalgia, making it a perfect choice for special moments. Dive into the soothing tunes and let the music transport you to a world of emotions.
stanzaMeanings: This moment is my moment, a golden moment in my life.
In the desert sky, a goddess cloud. A moment like milk in the desert.
Until the last moment of life. A flower-scented moment.
This moment is my moment, a golden moment in my life.
Can’t we stay like this? Can’t your eyelids meet mine?
Can’t we stay like this? Can’t the times freeze like this?
Can’t the closed eyes bloom like flowers? Can’t the stars bloom like the moon?
My love, in the warmth of your embrace, can’t we stay together as long as we live?
This moment is my moment, a golden moment in my life.
Peace, lightning, don’t leave my heart. Don’t throw my life into the fire.
Chorus, chorus, don’t leave the song. The river that reached the door shouldn’t dry up.
The trust in my heart shouldn’t change. The warmth with my chest shouldn’t cool.
My love, in the joyful tears from your eyes, can’t my life melt with yours?
This moment is my moment, a golden moment in my life.
In the desert sky, a goddess cloud. A moment like milk in the desert.
Until the last moment of life. A flower-scented moment.
This moment is my moment, a golden moment in my life.
